queries.name: Unified Customer 360 Profile with Real-Time Channel Attribution
queries.pain_point: No unified customer profile across touchpoints - customers appear as separate entities across systems
queries.query:
FROM customer_transactions
| WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - 30 days
| LOOKUP JOIN customers ON customer_id
| STATS 
    recent_transaction_count = COUNT(*),
    recent_revenue = SUM(transaction_amount),
    online_transactions = COUNT(*) WHERE channel == "online",
    instore_transactions = COUNT(*) WHERE channel == "in-store",
    avg_order_value = AVG(transaction_amount)
  BY customer_id, customers.customer_name, customers.customer_segment, customers.lifetime_revenue, customers.predicted_clv, customers.churn_probability
| EVAL 
    channel_preference_score = (online_transactions * 1.0) / (online_transactions + instore_transactions),
    revenue_trend = (recent_revenue / 30) * 365,
    clv_realization_rate = (customers.lifetime_revenue / customers.predicted_clv) * 100
| WHERE customers.customer_segment == ?segment
| SORT customers.churn_probability DESC, customers.predicted_clv DESC
| LIMIT 100
queries.description: Creates unified real-time customer profiles consolidating online and in-store activity with predictive metrics, solving fragmented cross-channel view

queries.name: Advanced RFM Segmentation with Behavioral Anomaly Detection
queries.pain_point: Limited real-time customer segmentation capabilities - batch processing creates 24+ hour delays in segment updates
queries.query:
FROM customer_transactions
| WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - 90 days
| LOOKUP JOIN customers ON customer_id
| STATS 
    recent_spend = SUM(transaction_amount),
    recent_transactions = COUNT(*)
  BY customer_id, customers.customer_name, customers.rfm_segment, customers.rfm_recency_score, customers.rfm_frequency_score, customers.rfm_monetary_score
| INLINESTATS 
    avg_spend_by_segment = AVG(recent_spend) BY customers.rfm_segment,
    avg_transactions_by_segment = AVG(recent_transactions) BY customers.rfm_segment
| EVAL 
    spend_variance_pct = ((recent_spend - avg_spend_by_segment) / avg_spend_by_segment) * 100,
    transaction_variance_pct = ((recent_transactions - avg_transactions_by_segment) / avg_transactions_by_segment) * 100,
    rfm_composite_score = customers.rfm_recency_score + customers.rfm_frequency_score + customers.rfm_monetary_score,
    behavior_anomaly_flag = CASE(
      spend_variance_pct < -30 OR transaction_variance_pct < -30, "declining_risk",
      spend_variance_pct > 50 AND transaction_variance_pct > 30, "high_growth",
      "normal"
    )
| WHERE behavior_anomaly_flag != "normal"
| SORT spend_variance_pct ASC
| LIMIT 500
queries.description: Real-time RFM segmentation with inline statistical comparison to detect customers deviating from segment norms, enabling immediate intervention

queries.name: Product Affinity Market Basket Analysis with Cross-Channel Insights
queries.pain_point: Insufficient behavioral pattern detection - manual analysis cannot uncover complex multi-dimensional purchasing patterns
queries.query:
FROM customer_transactions
| WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - 60 days
| LOOKUP JOIN products ON product_id
| STATS 
    total_purchases = COUNT(*),
    total_revenue = SUM(transaction_amount),
    unique_customers = COUNT_DISTINCT(customer_id),
    online_purchases = COUNT(*) WHERE channel == "online",
    instore_purchases = COUNT(*) WHERE channel == "in-store",
    avg_basket_value = AVG(transaction_amount)
  BY products.product_category, products.product_subcategory
| EVAL 
    affinity_score = (unique_customers * 1.0 / total_purchases) * 100,
    channel_preference = CASE(
      online_purchases > instore_purchases * 1.5, "online_dominant",
      instore_purchases > online_purchases * 1.5, "instore_dominant",
      "balanced"
    ),
    revenue_per_customer = total_revenue / unique_customers
| WHERE total_purchases >= 50
| SORT affinity_score DESC, total_revenue DESC
| LIMIT 50
queries.description: Discovers product category affinity patterns across channels with customer concentration metrics for merchandising optimization

queries.name: Semantic Customer Behavior Discovery for Retention Targeting
queries.pain_point: Churn Prediction & Proactive Retention - identify at-risk customers before they lapse
queries.query:
FROM customers
| WHERE SEMANTIC(customer_behavior_profile, "high value customers showing declining engagement or reduced purchase frequency")
| WHERE churn_probability > 0.6
| LOOKUP JOIN customer_transactions ON customer_id
| WHERE customer_transactions.@timestamp >= NOW() - 180 days
| STATS 
    last_transaction_date = MAX(customer_transactions.@timestamp),
    total_recent_spend = SUM(customer_transactions.transaction_amount),
    transaction_frequency = COUNT(*)
  BY customer_id, customer_name, churn_probability, predicted_clv, customer_segment
| EVAL 
    days_since_purchase = (NOW() - last_transaction_date) / 86400000,
    retention_priority_score = (predicted_clv * churn_probability) / 1000,
    recommended_action = CASE(
      days_since_purchase > 60 AND predicted_clv > 5000, "urgent_vip_outreach",
      days_since_purchase > 45 AND predicted_clv > 2000, "personalized_offer",
      days_since_purchase > 30, "re_engagement_campaign",
      "monitor"
    )
| WHERE recommended_action != "monitor"
| SORT retention_priority_score DESC
| LIMIT 200
queries.description: Uses semantic search to intelligently identify at-risk high-value customers with declining patterns, providing actionable retention priorities

queries.name: Multi-Dimensional Campaign Performance with Real-Time ROI by Segment
queries.pain_point: Slow time-to-insight for business stakeholders - custom analyses take 1-2 weeks to deliver
queries.query:
FROM customer_transactions
| WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - 30 days AND campaign_id IS NOT NULL
| LOOKUP JOIN customers ON customer_id
| LOOKUP JOIN campaigns ON campaign_id
| FORK
  (
    STATS 
      total_campaign_revenue = SUM(transaction_amount),
      total_transactions = COUNT(*),
      unique_customers = COUNT_DISTINCT(customer_id)
    BY campaigns.campaign_id, campaigns.campaign_name, campaigns.campaign_budget, campaigns.target_segment
    | EVAL 
        campaign_roi = ((total_campaign_revenue - campaigns.campaign_budget) / campaigns.campaign_budget) * 100,
        revenue_per_customer = total_campaign_revenue / unique_customers,
        conversion_rate = (unique_customers * 1.0 / 10000) * 100
    | SORT campaign_roi DESC
  )
  (
    STATS 
      segment_revenue = SUM(transaction_amount),
      segment_customers = COUNT_DISTINCT(customer_id),
      avg_clv = AVG(customers.predicted_clv)
    BY customers.customer_segment, campaigns.campaign_type
    | EVAL segment_performance_index = (segment_revenue / segment_customers) * (avg_clv / 1000)
    | SORT segment_performance_index DESC
  )
  (
    STATS 
      channel_revenue = SUM(transaction_amount),
      channel_transactions = COUNT(*)
    BY channel, campaigns.campaign_name
    | EVAL avg_order_value = channel_revenue / channel_transactions
    | SORT channel_revenue DESC
  )
queries.description: Parallel multi-dimensional campaign analysis providing instant ROI, segment performance, and channel attribution without manual reconciliation
